title: Generate a wiki summary.json
description: Devkit port of the legacy `generate-wiki-summary.js` script. Walks a wiki folder via the Nx Tree (dry-run-safe, never raw fs) and (re)writes `<wikiFolder>/summary.json` — an ordered tree of `{ title, file, children? }` nodes. Markdown docs are ordered by a per-folder `.order` file (LF/CRLF-tolerant) and a folder contributes `children` only when a sibling `<folder>.md` doc exists.

wikiFolder.description: Workspace-relative path to the wiki folder to summarise. Honors the house layout — typically `packages/<lib>/wiki`. `summary.json` is written at `<wikiFolder>/summary.json`.
wikiFolder.x-prompt: Which wiki folder should be summarised (e.g. packages/<lib>/wiki)?
